shortDescription: CEFR B2 · DELF/DALF pathway · European Languages

policyAlert.summary: Confirm B2 target and exam goal (DELF/DALF/TEF) before enrollment. Coaching fee separate from exam fee.

alert.title: Confirm student goal before enrollment
alert.body: Verify pathway, target score/level, and timeline before enrolling in French Language B2.

about.label: Description
about.value: Structured French Language B2 preparation with trainer-led classes, homework, and progress tracking.

about.label: Ideal for
about.value: Students targeting CEFR B2 for study, work, or Canada/France immigration French requirements.

about.label: Delivery
about.value: Classroom or hybrid per branch schedule. Materials per program policy.

about.label: After course
about.value: Exam guidance, score tracking, retake recommendation, and handoff to admissions/visa team when target met.

eligibility.criterion: Diagnostic or prior score on file

redFlagsBanner: If attendance drops or mocks stay far below target, pause exam booking and reset the study plan.

redFlags.title: Unrealistic target
redFlags.description: Large gap expected in very short timeline.
redFlags.fix: Reset timeline or recommend appropriate program

redFlags.title: Chronic absenteeism
redFlags.fix: Counselor call, batch change, or pause

faqs.q: Who pays the official exam fee?
faqs.a: The student pays the test authority directly where applicable. FLC coaching fee is separate.

faqs.q: Can Future Link guarantee the target score?
faqs.a: No. We set targets from diagnostics and track progress — outcomes depend on student effort and attendance.
Verify program variant — some batches include books, others are materials-light.
Minimum per program policy — track mocks before advising exam booking.

compliance: Never guarantee exam scores or bands
Separate coaching fee from exam registration fee
Signed enrollment agreement before batch start
Record diagnostic and mock scores on client file
proTips: Set target in writing at enrollment
Confirm correct test/module for student pathway
Book official exam only when mocks support readiness
postApproval: Collect official score report when released
Update client record for admissions / visa team
Plan retake or booster if below target

timeline.title: Exam booking, test day prep, score follow-up

dos: Keep exam fee separate on quotes
mistakes: Visa team not updated when target met

quiz.question: Counselors must never for French Language B2:
quiz.explanation: Score guarantees are prohibited for all coaching programs.

quiz.question: French Language B2 coaching fee and official exam fee should be:
quiz.explanation: Coaching and exam fees must be quoted separately.

quiz.question: Before enrollment in French Language B2, FLC recommends:
quiz.explanation: Diagnostic and target alignment are required before batch start.

quiz.explanation: Review attendance when it drops below 80%.

quiz.question: French coaching targets are usually framed as:

quiz.explanation: Readiness should be based on mock performance.

options: Logged on client file and shared with visa/admissions team
quiz.explanation: Score reports must be documented and handed off when relevant.

quiz.question: DELF/DALF exams are separate from:
quiz.explanation: Exam fees are paid to test authorities separately.

quiz.question: A student with unrealistic target timeline for French Language B2 should:
quiz.explanation: Unrealistic timelines must be corrected before enrollment.

Visa/admissions team handoff for French Language B2 happens when:
options: Target met and official report available
quiz.explanation: Hand off when target is met and documentation is on file.

quiz.question: Canada immigration French may require:
options: TEF/TCF or approved tests — confirm program
quiz.explanation: Confirm accepted French tests for the pathway.

quiz.question: French A1 crash is appropriate when:
options: Gap to target is realistic and deadline exists
Complete beginner to C2 in 2 weeks
quiz.explanation: Crash requires realistic gap and deadline.
